nasb.text: The sons of Benjamin did so, and took wives according to their number from those who danced, whom they carried away. And they went and returned to their inheritance and rebuilt the cities and lived in them.

esv.text: And the people of Benjamin did so and took their wives, according to their number, from the dancers whom they carried off. Then they went and returned to their inheritance and rebuilt the towns and lived in them.

cnv.text: 於是便雅憫人照樣行了：按著他們的數目，從跳舞的女子中強搶她們作妻子，然後離開那裡，回到自己的地業去，重建城市，住在其中。

ccb.text: 便雅悯人就依计行事，从跳舞的女子中各自抢了一个，带回自己的家乡做妻子。他们重建城邑，住在其中。
